skills.title: Front-End
skills.description: I possess strong proficiency in building dynamic user interfaces using React.js, along with a solid grasp of modern web technologies such as Tailwind CSS, HTML, CSS, JavaScript and JQuery.

skills.title: Back-End
skills.description: My backend skills include leveraging Firebase and Appwrite to architect and deploy robust, scalable backend solutions. I'm adept at integrating authentication, real-time databases, and cloud functions for efficient and secure application operations.

skills.title: Mobile App Development
skills.description: Proficient in developing cross-platform mobile applications using Flutter, I specialize in creating efficient, responsive, and visually appealing mobile interfaces that deliver seamless user experiences.
